name: Quescaper
short_description: You were thrown into a dungeon with the undead and only a sword was left for defense. Can you get through this underground maze and survive?
detailed_description:
You were thrown into a dungeon with the undead and only a sword was left for defense. Can you get through this underground maze and survive?

Upgrade your character

To defeat the crowd of undead you will have to stay in one place! Upgrade your character for coins that fall out of enemies and move further and further into the maze.

Explore the area

The key to salvation can be anywhere. In this huge maze, every room is important! You may be able to find boxes of coins or stumble upon an ambush of enemies.

The goal of the game is to find all the keys to the dungeon and escape from the prison.

Features:
- Leveling up the player
- Dynamic gameplay
- Achievements
- Colorful graphics
